notes: Microsoft SQL Server is a relational DB accessed over the TDS protocol via the node mssql/tedious driver, not a REST API. Synthesized from the adaptor surface (sql, findValue, insert, insertMany, upsert, upsertIf, upsertMany, describeTable, insertTable, modifyTable). Endpoints and servers.url are mock placeholders; response shapes model recordsets, rowsAffected, and column metadata for seeding.
